title: Cyathea microdonta
intro: Cyathea microdonta, also known as the mountain tree fern or New Zealand tree fern, is a species of tree fern in the family Cyatheaceae. The health benefits of Cyathea microdonta include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health due to its rich content of flavonoids and sesquiterpenes. The bioactive constituents of this plant include a range of triterpenes, such as 3β,16α-dihydroxyurs-12-en-28-oic acid and 3β,16α,23-trihydroxyurs-12-en-28-oic acid, as well as sesquiterpenes and flavonoids. Cyathea microdonta is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to support cardiovascular health and reduce stress.
